query:
SELECT sr.id, sr.status, sr.totalScore, sr.userId, s.name as scenarioName, s.moduleId
FROM scenario_runs sr
JOIN scenarios s ON sr.scenarioId = s.id
WHERE sr.userId = 1470015
ORDER BY sr.id ASC;
